name: smartinbox-root
description: Root configuration to boot both Frontend and Backend concurrently.

scripts.dev: start cmd /k "npm run dev:backend" && start cmd /k "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd .venv\Scripts && activate.bat && cd ..\.. && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
